rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF PING YAU TSANG
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT
rulings.Rulings: continued to march 26, 2018. new notice must be given for the amendment. please note, any proof of service filed contemporaneously with an amendment is not proper service, as notice cannot be mailed until the amendment is filed. so the statement in the POS would either be untrue (I served) or proof that service was defective (notice given before the petition was filed). new notice must be sent for the continued hearing date and new POS filed.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE THE LIGHT FAMILY LIVING TRUST DATED 8/3/99 TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Compel Petitioner For Reimbursement To The Trust For Expenses Related To Trust Administration And Proposed Order
rulings.Rulings: There is no legal basis for seeking this relief by motion as opposed to a fully noticed petition. The motion is ordered off calendar without prejudice to a properly filed petition asking for such relief. Any party wishing to contest this tentative ruling by appearing at the scheduled hearing must so advise other parties and the courtroom clerk (415-551-3702) no later than 4:00 p.m. Tuesday, March 6, 2018.

rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: continued to march 21, 2018. proposed order received. additional documents were received, all of which were incomplete but were not FILED. the court can only review FILED documents. note-->the ad submission for publication is not the same as proof of publication; both pages of the Notice of Petition to Administer Estate must be filed; and the declaration must have a caption page. deadline for getting all required documents on file in order to avoid another automatic continuance is thursdsay, march 15, 2018.
